name: Dubai
key_planning_challenge: Linear coastal development, desert climate, water demand, and mobility require compact nodes along high-capacity corridors.
expansion_constraint: Desert heat, coastal reclamation limits, water demand, highway-oriented urban form

historical_snapshots.key_event: Creek trading settlement before oil-era expansion
Port Rashid and early infrastructure investment begin
Jebel Ali and highway-led growth accelerate
Metro opens and high-rise districts mature
Dubai 2040 plan emphasizes compact urban centers
